prompt_inputs.goal: maintain athletic performance for soccer with high energy demands

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
All foods are vegan with no animal products
Includes complete protein sources and iron-rich foods suitable for an athlete
Plan is compact and concise (brief descriptions, not lengthy)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan soccer player) requiring complete protein sources and iron-rich foods while maintaining athletic performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with peak performance during a 20-mile long run scheduled for 10 AM

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 1 day of meals with appropriate timing around the 10 AM training session
Includes high carbohydrate intake (55-65% of calories) suitable for endurance athlete
Pre-workout meal provided 2-3 hours before training and post-workout meal within 30-60 minutes after completion
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength through weightlifting with 4-hour gym session at 10 AM

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals strategically timed around the 10 AM workout
Provides adequate protein intake (minimum 1g per pound of body weight = 185g total)
Includes pre-workout and post-workout nutrition within 1-2 hours of gym session
Plan is compact and concise (brief descriptions, not lengthy explanations)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) with specific protein requirements and meal timing around intense gym sessions
